transcript.text:
[This stop is Tzuyang, Tzuyang station]
[The doors are opening]
[There is no more chobap (sushi) left]
Hello everyone
I am here at Daejeon Terminal Complex
I've been craving chobap all day, so I'm going to go to a conveyor belt sushi restaurant
I found a place that sells every plate for 1,300 Won (~$1)
Isn't it extremely cheap?
Anyway, I will eat my fill since it only costs a dollar per plate
Let's go
[1,300 Hoejeon Chobap, Donggu county, City of Daejeon]
-Welcome -Hello
Which one should I start with first?
Look, soy sauce.
It's a soy sauce-based chobap
Wait, that's not it. It's soy sauce-marinated shrimp chobap

It's tasty
It's been so long since I had chobap
Salmon!
[soy sauce on her face]
It's tteokgalbi (grilled short ribs patties)!
I don't even remember the last time I came to a conveyor belt sushi restaurant
It doesn't look special at all, but it's so yummy
Conch! [Nope, it's not]
Is it scallop? It looks like it [Yep]
It's very tender
Yummy
A plate....
He just put it on the belt
It's a steak tartare chobap
Delicious
Wow, this is..

This one looks different from the shrimp chobap I just had
The size of the shrimp is way bigger
Yummy
They have abalone too
Tasty It's an abalone sashimi
I have to keep an eye on the belt while eating as well
Beef tastes good too
This is the salmon belly, one of the most delicious parts
Ah-ha, it's lightly baked
Gosh, it's fantastic
I need to grab one more of this
Let's try an octopus chobap
I'm very picky when it comes to chobap
I think it tastes best when you dine-in
He put something on the belt
I've never seen that before

What is this?
Wow, it looks very interesting
They put the marinated shrimp and some flying fish roe on top of a tamago (omelette) chobap
Uni (sea urchin)
[The restaurant charges any special dish, ordered on her request, by giving more plates]
[Veggies are out]
The color is so pretty
Yummy
I want to order this only
Look, I've piled up a lot already
What is this? This looks interesting
Stir fried marinated squid? [Correct]
I still can't tell what it is
What is this?
And this?
You should grab everything that looks delicious first

Thank you very much
It's tuna belly!
This is incredible
[Let's finish the ones that I grabbed earlier]
This is the baked salmon I had earlier
Woosamgyup (Thinly sliced pork loin)!
Tuna belly! OMG, the meat quality looks incredibly amazing compared to the price
[Amazed]
This is super tasty. It's insane
Which one should I grab..?
The tteokgalbi chobap was pretty yummy. I want another plate
This is not the one. Wait, is it?
Two pieces at once
What is this?
It tastes like yubu (fried bean curd)
Is it yubu?

Flatfish
It's so tasty
I found the tteokgalbi chobap!
The flavors bring back memories
[Humming in delight]
[Counting]
Where was I? I lost count
[Let's try that again]
[Third time's the charm]
[Dummy]
37! 38!
Total 38 plates!
Eel! That's an eel chobap
They are all mine!
I grabbed 3 of them
Just so you know, I can do this only because it's pretty late at night and there are no other customers

No way, I gotta grab more
[Amazed]
This is insane
You can't be eating the eel chobap only..!
[Embarrassed]
I need to try something that I haven't had yet
This is flatfish fin
I love the fin!
[How can it be this tasty?]
[She found another one]
[She's going crazy]
They made a lot of the fin chobap
The fin is normally pretty expensive
Just out of curiosity, because I see lots of leftovers on the belt
Can't you guys sell the leftovers the next day?
Yes, but we've been donating them

Huh???
Did you say donations?
So you put all the leftovers in a box after closing and donate it to somewhere?
Wow... I am very impressed
They have such a good heart
The fact that they are donating the leftover foods is very touching
Now the dishes look more appetizing knowing that
Can I get 3 more plates of uni and tuna belly
Let's see. Any freshly made dishes should be all tasty
The woosamgyup (thinly sliced pork loin) is very yummy
-Here's your order -Thank you!
Uni
It's seriously so tasty
I usually order chobap for delivery
And most of them were really bad and bitter
But this restaurant serves a very high quality delicious and savory chobap

Do you think I can put this on top?
[Missed]
Thank you very much!
Gosh, the quality of the meat is just insane here
Gorgeous
[Happy]
37 plates
That means this pile has 36 plates
37 plus 36
60.. 70.. 73
[Right?]
2.. 4.. 6.. a total of 95 plates already
This tastes so good
Eel!
That's the eel chobap
[You can't be eating the eels only]

They put only a little bit of wasabi
So put as much wasabi as you want on top of it
[Scanning]
Which one should I eat next
Excuse me, do you have more abalones by any chance?
Of course, how many?
Um.. 3 please
Salmon! Salmon!
The very thick one is really tasty
It's here! Abalone, abalone
I got all 3 of them
It makes me excited. I'm so happy
What is this?
A cheese ball?
It's actually good
Udon for dessert with shrimp tempura

OMG, I almost dropped it
It's cold but still tasty
This is a shrimp tempura udon! The best combination
Tempura tastes really good when you dip it in the soup
Let me finish this dakkochi (grilled chicken skewer) that I grabbed earlier
I downed the bowl
Finished!
It was the first time in a while eating at a conveyor belt restaurant
The price is extremely reasonable, and the idea of donating the leftover food is very impressive
Thanks for watching!
[How many plates did she have?]
Maybe around 120?
[How many in total?]
[112 plates of sushi]
You were very close, sir!
How did you get it so close?

The years of experience for sure
The bill, please
112 plates plus 2 drinks, right?
Yes
Wow.. Not even over 150,000 Won (~$140)
It's 149,600 Won in total!
